categories.label: Culture Points (Track)
categories.description: Culture points accumulated during the game from wonders, leaders, and card effects

categories.label: Age III Event Scoring
categories.description: Culture points from Age III events evaluated at game end (full game only)

categories.label: Technology Scoring
categories.description: Points from technologies (simple game: 1 per Age I tech, 2 per Age II tech, governments count double)

categories.label: Science + Strength + Happiness
categories.description: Culture equal to your science, strength, and happiness ratings (simple game)

categories.label: Production
categories.description: Points from food and resource production values (simple game)

categories.label: Colonies & Wonders
categories.description: 3 per colony, 6 per completed Age II wonder (simple game)
